title: Acinodendron decipiens
taxonomy: Acinodendron decipiens is classified within the family Melastomataceae. This family is a part of the order Myrtales in the angiosperm clade. The order Myrtales is a part of the clade rosids in the broader clade of flowering plants. The classification of Acinodendron decipiens reflects its evolutionary relationships to other plants within its family and order.
